channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia F1 race cancellations confirmed due to Iran war
item.description: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia's Formula One Grands Prix races will not be held in April on safety grounds due to the war.

item.title: US-Israeli strike kills 15 at Isfahan factory, Iranian media says
item.description: Iranian media report the deaths in central Iran as Tehran launches new missile salvoes at Israeli targets.

item.title: Thousands in Madrid protest ‘forgotten’ Gaza, warn Iran war may spiral into
item.description: Thousands rallied in central Madrid calling for an end to the war involving the United States, Israel and Iran.

item.title: Hundreds protest against US-Israeli strikes on Iran in Seoul
item.description: Hundreds of peace activists and demonstrators marched in central Seoul on Saturday in protest of the US-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Three members of Iranian women’s football team pull Australia asylum bids
item.description: Seven members of the Iranian football delegation sought asylum, with four now known to have withdrawn applications.

item.title: Turkey on alert as Iran conflict escalates, warns against provocations
item.description: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan says Ankara is monitoring the regional war involving Iran, the US, and Israel.

item.title: UNESCO condemns strike on Minab girls’ school: ‘They attacked twice… How
item.description: Secretary of Iran’s National Commission for UNESCO, condemned a missile strike on a girls’ primary school in Minab.

item.title: Six killed in attacks on Ukraine as EU extends sanctions against Russians
item.description: EU maintains pressure after slamming US for lifting sanctions on Russian oil exports as Middle East war bites.

item.title: Trump administration threatens news outlets over critical coverage of Iran
item.description: FCC chair says news outlets that share 'distortions' about US war with Iran could lose their licences.

item.title: Iranian woman explains ‘Allahu Akbar’ to Americans, amid explosion in Iran
item.description: Video shows an Iranian woman recording a message to Americans, amid an explosion in Iran.
